decisions.title_en: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.7, retakes LLM lead on SWE-Bench Pro and agentic coding
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. New model release — Opus 4.7 scores 64.3% on SWE-Bench Pro (vs 53.4% on 4.6), 87.6% on SWE-Bench Verified, introduces xhigh effort tier, high-resolution vision (2576px), task budgets, cyber safeguards. Anthropic's Mythos/nerfing stories in lookback are about different issues.

decisions.title_en: Snap cuts 1000 jobs citing AI code generation efficiencies
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Snap laid off 16% of workforce, cites 65% of new code AI-generated, targets $500M annualized cost savings. First major consumer tech layoff explicitly attributed to AI-driven productivity.

decisions.title_en: XChat standalone app launches today with Grok integration
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-04-13 as preview ('XChat独立App即将发布：Elon Musk超级应用梦想迈出关键一步'). Today is actual launch day (2026-04-17). New info: real-world launch observation, user reception, Grok integration feature details from live app — substantively new from preview announcement.

decisions.title_en: Perplexity launches Personal Computer for Mac, turning Mac mini into always-on AI agent
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Previous Perplexity entries were about iOS Comet and agent growth. Today's launch: Personal Computer rolls out to Mac for Max subscribers ($200/mo), accesses local files, iMessage, Mail, Calendar; company recommends dedicated Mac mini for 24/7 operation.

decisions.title_en: American Express acquires Sam Altman-backed AI expense startup Hyper
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. AmEx announces acquisition of Hyper (AI expense agent platform backed by Altman), closing Q2 2026. Builds on earlier Hypercard partnership. Signals traditional financial services consolidating AI-native startups.

decisions.title_en: Cadence and NVIDIA expand partnership for robot AI simulation and Millennium M2000 supercomputer
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Joint CEO announcement integrates Cadence physics engines with NVIDIA Isaac and Cosmos for sim-to-real robotics training. Millennium M2000 uses HGX B200 + RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell, claims 80x EDA perf. Cadence stock surged.

decisions.title_en: Siri engineers sent to AI coding bootcamp as Apple prepares Siri overhaul
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Leaked internal training program — Apple sending Siri engineers through intensive AI coding bootcamp before iOS 27 WWDC unveil. Custom Gemini model, standalone Siri app, third-party chatbot integration via Siri. Shows Apple's delayed-AI catch-up strategy.

decisions.title_en: Antioch raises $8.5M to be the 'Cursor for physical AI' with robot simulation platform
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Seed round led by A* and Category Ventures at $60M valuation, 4 months after $4.5M pre-seed. CEO is ex-Tesla Autopilot. Addresses sim-to-real gap — complements Cadence/NVIDIA story on same theme.

decisions.title_en: Parasail raises $32M Series A for tokenmaxxing AI inference supercloud
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. $32M Series A co-led by Touring and Kindred, Samsung NEXT participating. Processes 500B tokens/day, 30% MoM revenue. Customers include Elicit, mem0, Venice. Pay-per-token model without lock-in.

decisions.title_en: Elicit raises $22M Series A at $100M valuation for scientific research AI
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. $22M Series A led by Spark Capital and Footwork, existing Fifty Years and Basis Set participating. 400K monthly researchers. Expanding from academia to evidence-based reasoning across industries.

decisions.title_en: InsightFinder raises $15M Series B for AI agent reliability observability
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. $15M Series B to scale 'Autonomous Reliability Insights' product — detects, diagnoses, and prevents AI agent failures. Customers: UBS, NBCUniversal, Lenovo, Dell, Google Cloud, Comcast. Revenue 3x YoY.

decisions.title_en: Google Vids AI voiceovers expand to 16 new languages in Workspace
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Full rollout 2026-04-15 for Rapid/Scheduled Release domains. Adds Hindi, Arabic, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian and more — major push for non-English AI voice generation in productivity.
